title: Credit risk
content: For late-paying customers, reduce new credit, set a clear follow-up date, and prioritize collecting old dues before increasing the limit.

title: Inventory reorder
content: For fast-moving products, compare current stock with recent sales speed and reorder before the product reaches zero.

title: Profit check
content: Profit should be checked using selling price, buying price, quantity, discounts, expenses, wastage, and unpaid credit.

title: Cash flow
content: When cash flow is low, collect pending credit, control unnecessary expenses, and push more cash or digital-payment sales.

title: Order operations
content: Order operations improve when each order has a clear status, payment mode, delivery or pickup choice, and customer note.

title: Business AI scope
content: BGPT is business-only and should focus on shopkeeper workflows: sales, inventory, credit, profit, customers, orders, billing, delivery, and operations.
